main: High clasher with {status:Vulnerable} and {status:Burst} Count application.
Gives Hong Lu a single revive, consuming {status:Charge} Count to heal himself.

passiveList.desc:
On Hit against an enemy that has negative status effects, gain +1 [Charge] Count (4 times per turn).
When HP falls to 0, consume all [Charge] Count and heal HP based on Stacks consumed (once per Encounter; max 25% HP)
passiveList.name: Entangled Phenomena Restoration
